name: Cold Asparagus with Sesame-Ginger Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------DRESSING----------------------------------
1 tablespoon Toasted sesame seeds
1 small Garlic clove, minced
1 teaspoon Fresh ginger, grated
2 tablespoons Rice vinegar
2 tablespoons Orange juice
2 teaspoons Soy sauce
2 tablespoons Vegetable oil
1 teaspoon Sugar
1/4 teaspoon Red chile flakes
1/4 teaspoon Sesame oil
To toast sesame seeds:
1. Place sesame seeds in a small skillet.
2. Heat over medium, stirring frequently until fragrant and just golden.
3. Watch carefully to avoid burning.
4. Remove from heat and break off any woody parts.
Instructions for asparagus:
1. Cut the asparagus stalks into appropriate lengths.
2. Bring lightly salted water to boil in a medium skillet.
3. Add asparagus and cook for 5 minutes or until tender-crisp.
4. Immediately remove asparagus from boiling water and immerse in ice-water.
5. Pat dry and arrange on a platter.
1. In a blender, combine all dressing ingredients.
2. Blend until thoroughly combined.
3. Pour the dressing evenly over the asparagus.
4. Serve. Makes 1/3 cup.
